# @platform/adapters-clickhouse

ClickHouse adapter package for analytical event ingestion, analytical queries, and high-volume reporting workloads.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-clickhouse
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-clickhouse
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: analytics
Bounded context: clickhouse-runtime
Owner: team-data
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-data
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own ClickHouse runtime adapter boundaries
- Write analytical events and normalized ingestion events to ClickHouse
- Execute analytical queries through governed analytical contracts

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not persist transactional user profile configuration
- Does not own profile or access-control policy
- Does not render React components

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Consumed by ingestion, analytics, and reporting edges
- Used for analytical workloads distinct from PostgreSQL transactional persistence

## Boundaries

### Allowed consumers

```text
adapter
worker-runtime
api-runtime
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
react-runtime
transactional-profile-store
```

## Operational notes

- ClickHouse is the expected analytical store for external data ingestion events, high-volume event data, and reporting queries
